source.label: Google Books Ngram Viewer
source.note: Values are yearly Ngram fractions converted to frequency per million. Case-insensitive rows use the '(All)' aggregate when returned.

series.caveat: Google Books Ngram measures printed-book visibility, not semantic meaning. Case-insensitive aggregates may include OCR and capitalization noise.
